title: Convert start_link to start_supervised! in a GenServer test
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/flaky_genserver_test.ex` starts a `CounterServer` via `start_link` that outlives the test process. Rewrite to `test/my_app/counter_server_test.exs`: replace `CounterServer.start_link(name: :my_counter)` with `start_supervised!({CounterServer, name: :my_counter})` so the GenServer is terminated before the test's sandbox connection is reclaimed. Preserve `async: true`.
tier_rationale: Pattern swap with named failure mode (lifetime escaping the test).
research_citation: "you might try to start the genserver under the test supervisor so it doesn't outlive the individual test process" — Elixir Forum, CherryPoppins
